sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, age INT, name STRING);
CREATE IMPRINTS INDEX age_imprint ON test_table (age);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, age, name) VALUES (1, 30, 'Alice');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, age, name) VALUES (2, 40, 'Bob');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age BETWEEN 25 AND 35;
